chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4085 of 2018 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.18418/2018 2.For hearing of main case. 04.03.2025 Mr.Hanif Farhan Alam, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Mr.Muhammad Ajmal, Advocate for Respondent (S.R.B) Present petition assails show cause notice, however, learned counsel submits that the petitioner shall contest the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, however, pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent (S.R.B) articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
